Description:
Ballistics of the OF-83 HE-Frag Incendiary rounds fired from the NN-30 autocannon (factory designation 291P) as part of the KD-302 and AK-230 weapon system. The KD-302 autocannon was reverse engineered in the PRC and modified as the Type 69 dual 30mm naval gun. The OF-83 ammunition is copied as the WB706P.

Projectile weighs 354 grams, loads 175 grams of 7/14 pyroxylin propellant. Develops 1060 m/s at 3100 kgf/cm^2 peak breech pressure (copper crusher gauge, converts to 340.5 MPa) or 1050 +/- 10 m/s at 3000 kgf/cm^2. Barrel length is 2144mm, chamber measures 225mm, rate of fire in excess of 1000 rpm. Cartridge volume is 220 cm^3 and measures 171mm deep.

References:
 -《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
 -《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
